name: RoachNet
subtitle: RoachNetiOS installs for SideStore and AltStore
description: Shared RoachNetiOS AltSource for SideStore and AltStore, with RoachClaw, vault reads, runtime checks, install handoff, and the RoachAtlas GPS bridge close on iPhone and iPad.

apps.name: RoachNetiOS
apps.subtitle: RoachClaw in your pocket
apps.localizedDescription: RoachNetiOS keeps chat, voice prompts, image context, runtime reads, vault shelf access, install handoff, and a foreground-only RoachAtlas GPS bridge close. Pair to your desktop over RoachTail, or fall back to the offline-capable local lane when the bridge is down.

versions.localizedDescription: Adds the v1.0.5 companion contract, foreground RoachAtlas GPS BLE bridge, refreshed privacy prompts, and the shared SideStore/AltStore IPA lane.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: RoachNetiOS uses the camera to scan RoachTail pairing QR codes from your Mac.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: RoachNet iOS connects to your Mac companion runtime so you can keep using chats, vault data, and installs from your phone.
privacy.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: RoachNetiOS uses Bluetooth only when you start the RoachAtlas GPS bridge, so your Mac can read a local foreground GPS packet.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RoachNetiOS uses your location only while the foreground RoachAtlas GPS bridge is running for your paired Mac.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: RoachNetiOS uses the microphone for local voice prompts in RoachClaw.
privacy.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: RoachNetiOS turns speech into prompts so RoachClaw can stay hands-free when you need it.
